description: Refactor the Ultra GitLab frontend data layer to use TanStack Query v5. Replace all useEffect + useState data fetching with useQuery / useMutation / useQueries, eliminate redundant network calls through TQ cache deduplication, replace manual polling loops with refetchInterval, and surface errors consistently across the UI.

userStories.title: Install TanStack Query and wire up QueryClientProvider
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TanStack Query installed and a QueryClient configured so all subsequent hooks can use it.

userStories.title: Centralize Tauri event → cache invalidation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a single module that wires Tauri backend events to query invalidation so I don't maintain scattered tauriListen calls across multiple hooks.

userStories.title: Migrate simple read-only queries (Phase 1)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need simple, standalone queries for instances, settings, and companion status so I can remove duplicated useEffect fetches across pages.

userStories.title: Migrate MR list and MR detail queries (Phase 2)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TQ-backed queries for MR lists and MR detail data so that navigating between MRs doesn't refetch data that's already cached.

userStories.title: Replace file content dual-cache with TQ (Phase 3)
userStories.description: As a user, I want file navigation between diff files to feel instant when I've already viewed them, and I want adjacent files to load in the background automatically.

userStories.title: Migrate comment mutations with optimistic updates (Phase 4)
userStories.description: As a user, I want comments I post to appear immediately and remain visible as 'pending' until the backend confirms, and I want failed comments to disappear automatically.

userStories.title: Replace pipeline polling with TQ refetchInterval (Phase 5)
userStories.description: As a user, I want the pipeline dashboard and job log to update automatically while jobs are running, and stop polling when they complete, without manual intervention.

userStories.title: Migrate file comments and CommentOverlay (Phase 6)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need inline file comments to go through TQ mutations so the cache stays consistent between the file comment and activity views.

userStories.title: Migrate approval mutations and finalize settings (Phase 7)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need approval actions and settings saves to go through TQ so the UI stays consistent without manual cache management.

userStories.title: Consistent error state surface
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a clear error message when data fails to load instead of silently empty states.

userStories.title: Browser verification pass across all major flows
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to run through all major UI flows in the browser after the refactor is complete so that I can confirm loading states, data display, and interactions still work correctly end-to-end.
